title: advance_diversifier_to early-return drops transaction without explicit rollback
description: advance_diversifier_to() calls pool.begin() then on the idx<=current early-exit path returns Ok(()) without commit or explicit rollback. sqlx Drop silently rolls back but any Drop-level I/O error is discarded, producing Ok(()) with unknown DB state. Trigger: call advance_diversifier_to with idx <= stored value. Fix: call tx.rollback().await? before Ok(()).
